title: linochilus glutinosus
intro: Linochilus glutinosus, also known as the sticky tree or sticky vine, is a type of plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linochilus glutinosus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
